result.finding: No XML configuration files detected in the application source. The project uses Spring Boot's annotation-based @Configuration classes and application.properties files exclusively — a fully modern approach with zero XML-based Spring, Hibernate, or web.xml configuration.
evidence: No applicationContext.xml, spring-*.xml, or *-context.xml files found under src/
No web.xml found (Spring Boot uses embedded Tomcat with auto-configuration)
No persistence.xml found (Spring Boot auto-configures JPA)
No log4j.xml or logback.xml found (Spring Boot uses Logback via properties)
Only pom.xml (Maven build descriptor) found — not an application config
find src/ -name '*.xml' returns empty (no XML files in source tree)
values: JPA configuration: Auto-configured via spring-boot-starter-data-jpa + application.properties
Logging: Default Spring Boot Logback configured via application.properties properties
